name: APIVersion
description: A single released version of an API, including its identifier, release status, supported specification, and lifecycle dates.

api.description: Identifier of the API this version belongs to.

version.description: Version identifier as advertised to consumers.

scheme.description: Versioning scheme used for the version identifier.

released_at.description: Date the version was released to consumers.

deprecated_at.description: Date the version was marked deprecated, if applicable.

sunset_at.description: Date the version will be removed from service (Sunset HTTP header value, RFC 8594).

spec_url.description: URL to the machine-readable specification (OpenAPI, AsyncAPI, GraphQL SDL, Protobuf) for this version.

changelog_url.description: URL to the human-readable changelog for this version.

compatibility.description: Compatibility guarantee with the previous version of the API.

version_header.description: HTTP header used by clients to pin to this version.

breaking_changes.description: List of breaking change identifiers introduced by this version.
